name: Low Inventory Alert
description: Triggers when any product at any store falls below reorder point for 2+ consecutive hours

dataSource.query: Inventory | where quantity_on_hand < reorder_point | summarize ConsecutiveHours=dcount(bin(timestamp, 1h)) by store_id, product_id | where ConsecutiveHours >= 2

actions.subject: 🚨 Low Stock Alert: {{product_id}} at {{store_id}}
actions.body: Product {{product_id}} at store {{store_id}} has been below reorder point ({{reorder_point}}) for {{ConsecutiveHours}} hours. Current stock: {{quantity_on_hand}}.

actions.message: Low stock alert for {{product_id}} at {{store_id}}. Quantity: {{quantity_on_hand}}/{{reorder_point}}
